free_text: Gamma-ray production due to neutron interactions with
zinc. Tabulated differential cross sections for 31
gamma rays for incident neutron energies between 0.9
and 6 MeV.
Oak Ridge Electron Linear Accelerator
Photoneutrons
Time-of-flight, pulse-height discrimination
Germanium-lithium detector
Flux monitoring details given in reference article.
Data errors given are statistical and
relative errors, but do not include overall
uncertainty of beam flux which is about 20%.
Major sources of error are counting statistics and
uncertainties in flux determination.
Other errors include detector efficiency calibration
uncertainty (about 5%) and uncertainty of up to 20%
at E(gamma) = 300 keV for sample self-absorption
corrections.
Approved by author 1976/6/21.
Converted to REACTION formalism
BIB correction.
Converted to new data formts, lower case.
Peak due to two or more gamma rays.
Includes data for a slightly higher energy gamma
ray
REACTION corrected.
